inbox.act: SCAN TEST — tick 'Next': move this to next actions
SCAN TEST — tick 'Delegate': send this to someone else
SCAN TEST — tick 'Drop': discard this item entirely
SCAN TEST — tick 'Next' AND 'Delegate': conflict, next should win
SCAN TEST — defer 1w: kick this to the 1-week tickler
SCAN TEST — defer 1m: kick this to the 1-month tickler
SCAN TEST — leave blank: no action taken on this item

next.act: SCAN TEST — tick 'Done': this task is complete
SCAN TEST — tick 'Delegate': hand this off to someone
SCAN TEST — defer 1w: not urgent, push one week
SCAN TEST — defer 1m: push back a full month
SCAN TEST — defer 1q: push to next quarter
SCAN TEST — leave blank: carry forward as-is

delegated.act: SCAN TEST — tick 'Done': Alice confirmed she finished this
SCAN TEST — tick 'Back to me': Bob can't do it, reclaim it
SCAN TEST — defer 1w: chase Carol again next week
SCAN TEST — leave blank: still waiting, no change

week.act: SCAN TEST — tick 'Activate': pull this into next actions now
SCAN TEST — tick 'Done': this resolved itself, close it
SCAN TEST — redefer 1w: not ready yet, another week

month.act: SCAN TEST — tick 'Activate': time has come, move to next actions
SCAN TEST — redefer 1m: still not relevant, push another month

quarter.act: SCAN TEST — tick 'Done': no longer relevant, close it
SCAN TEST — leave blank: check again next quarter
